A '''magnetic accelerator''' was a projectile launcher believed to have been invented by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] to be used for personal defense. The weapon worked by using [[Magnet/Legends|magnets]] embedded in a machined track to launch a metal ball at great speeds towards an object. At some point, the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] created a large-scale version of this weapon that was mounted on the top of a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Meditation Sphere|Meditation Sphere]].

A magnetic accelerator was the base component for the launch mechanism of the [[MM9 mini concussion rocket launcher/Legends|MM9 rocket system]] and the [[power harpoon launcher]] which was used to propel [[fusion disk]]s attached to a [[high-tension cable]].<ref name="EGWT" />
